chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 599 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of pre-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of pre-arrest bail 16.09.2025 Mr. Shamsuddin Ghanghro, Advocate along with applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the applicant submits affidavit of the complainant, who is also present in Court and states that parties have compromised with each other, and as such, he has no objection to the grant of bail. Learned Additional Prosecutor General, in view of the nature of the dispute and compoundable sections available therein, does not feel to oppose the bail application although states that non-compoundable sections are also present. Irrespective to the same, where the incident is primarily that of causing hurt and the parties have compromised, there is not much room left to restrict the applicant from enjoyment of bail found present in the matter. Accordingly, without touching the merits, bail application stands allowed. The order dated 15.07.2025, whereby the applicant was granted interim pre-arrest bail, stands confirmed on the same terms and conditions. Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
